# Requirements document structure

Copy the **Requirement block** below for each user story. Replace placeholders; keep one blank line between blocks. Requirement IDs are **immutable** (never reuse or renumber).

---

## Requirement block

### REQ-000 — <Short title>

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **ID** | REQ-000 |
| **Title** | <Short title> |
| **Priority** | Must \| Should \| Could |
| **Actor(s)** | <Who initiates or benefits> |

**User story**

As a <role>, I want <capability>, so that <benefit>.

**Scope**

- In scope: <bullets>
- Out of scope: <bullets>

**Business rules**

1. <Rule>
2. <Rule>

**Responsive / UX notes** *(when UI is involved)*

- Mobile: <expectations>
- Tablet: <expectations>
- Desktop: <expectations>

**Dependencies**

- <REQ-xxx or external dependency; use “None” if none>

**Open questions**

- <Question or “None”>

---
